name: uderia-files
description: Filesystem access. Provides read_file, write_file, list_dir, and search_files tools. Admin configures an allowed path list.

ALLOWED_PATHS.label: Allowed base paths
ALLOWED_PATHS.description: Comma-separated list of absolute directory paths the agent is permitted to access. E.g. /data/reports,/tmp/agent

MAX_FILE_SIZE_KB.label: Max file size (KB)
MAX_FILE_SIZE_KB.description: Maximum file size in KB for read/write operations.
